description_long: This is a wooden half-moon console stool with a smooth, polished surface and a single shallow drawer at the center of its curved front. The stool stands on four slender, tapered legs that provide stability and a touch of elegance. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The drawer is accentuated by a small, round knob, suggesting a functional storage space. The back of the stool is flat, allowing it to be placed flush against a wall, making it ideal for entryways or hallways. The overall design is simple yet refined, with no visible decorative embellishments.
description: A wooden half-moon console stool with a single drawer, four tapered legs, and a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved front, central drawer with knob, and all four legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the semi-circular top and the depth of the drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the smooth wood grain and the profile of the legs.
